history.title: The Roots That Shape Us
history.subtitle: Over five decades growing alongside the fresh produce industry
content: Fruit Service is built on deep agricultural heritage, and a clear commitment to quality and service. With over 50 years of experience in growing and distributing fresh fruit, the founding family set out to create something different: a company that combines generations of experience, innovation and genuine partnership with our customers.

We began operations from modest facilities, but with one very clear vision: to deliver only the finest carefully selected fruit, and build business relationships based on trust and transparency. Through steady, sustainable growth we expanded our capacity and our presence across European and international markets.

Over the years we have continuously invested in technology, modern processes and expanded our facilities, establishing ourselves as one of the most respected operators in the sector. Our modern packing houses feature advanced grading and packaging systems, allowing us to process very high volumes every day while still treating every piece of fruit with care.

Today Fruit Service remains a family owned business. We combine the knowledge and wisdom passed down over generations, with modern management and a constant focus on the future. Innovation, sustainability, and our commitment to both farmers and customers are at the very core of who we are.

We are more than just an export company. Fruit Service is the result of decades of hard work, constant improvement, and a genuine passion for bringing the very best of the land to every one of our customers.
